rulings.Case Title: JULIO BORRUSO et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 9, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. A general demurrer does not lie to only part of a cause of action. If there are sufficient allegations to entitle plaintiff to relief, other allegations cannot be challenged by general demurrer. See Kong v. City of Hawaiian Gardens Redevelop. Agency (2003) 108 Cal. App. 4th 1028, 1046. Defendant did not bring a special demurrer per CCP 430.10(f) re: CRC 2.112 compliance. Defendant and its counsel are ordered again (See CGC-12-527342 March 12, 2013 tentative ruling) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT VILL, SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARGARET VS. GERARD B HARPIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defts, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 9, 2014, line 11. PLAINTIFF ROBERT VILL's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendants, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendants shall provide responses by personal service without objections to Form Interrogatories -UD, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, and Requests for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $610. = (501/PHA)
